title: Trust Health Dashboard
description: The Overview page now leads with a Trust Health Score — a single metric showing your agent trust posture across identity, encryption, governance, and compliance.

title: Security Command Center
description: Manage revocations, webhooks, and audit logs from a unified Security page. Revoke compromised agents, set up event notifications, and inspect encrypted audit entries.

title: Federation & Agent Discovery
description: Browse the cross-organization agent directory, filter by capability, and create federation invite tokens for multi-org collaboration.

title: API Playground
description: Interactive API explorer with pre-populated authentication. Test any endpoint, see live responses, and copy as cURL — all from the dashboard.

title: Compliance Report Generator
description: Auto-generate EU AI Act compliance reports mapping your Skytale usage to Article 16 requirements. Download as PDF for auditors.

title: Command Palette
description: Press Cmd+K (Mac) or Ctrl+K (Windows) to instantly navigate, search channels, or trigger actions from anywhere in the dashboard.
